title: "ETQW Fullscreen = Black Screen!"

### Post by forbore on 2008-11-18
I installed Ennemy Territory: Quake Wars on my PC but when I launch the game, it goes in fullscreen and I get an "Input Not Supported" error on my screen (It's not Ubuntu whose giving me this error)... I have this problem with other games but usually, I add a line in the config file so that the game doesn't launch in Fullscreen mode, but I don't know how to do this on ETQW! How can I change the config?

P.S. I tried ETQW on other distros before and it worked PERFECTLY! I have trouble with graphics on Ubuntu... My drivers are installed.

---

### Post by forbore on 2008-11-18
Admins, please delete this post! It was a copy of the next one...

---

### Post by forbore on 2008-11-18
I fixed it! Go in /home/USERNAME/.etqw/base/etqwconfig.cfg
Search for fullscreen. You will find seta r_fullscreen "1" Change the 1 to a 0. You will now be able to go in ETQW, and go in the options to change the resolution. Voila!

---
